results.user_prompt: Please locate all virtual events created by the owners of the team called TechCorp Solutions Team, and cancel them since the team's activities are being paused. After identifying these events, I (James) need you to determine which co-organizers appear in both types of virtual events and which appear in only one of them. For every co-organizer who is involved in both categories of events, create an individual chat with that person, and send a message addressing them by their full name and explaining that I (use my full name in the message), on behalf of the team, am pausing all activities for now, that this is the reason the virtual events are being canceled, and that we will schedule a meeting next week to discuss the situation in more detail. For co-organizers who appear in only one category of virtual event, create an individual chat with each of them, and send a message addressing them by their full name and explaining that I (use my full name in the message) am pausing operations for the team and that, for the moment, they should stop clocking hours because no further work is available right now.

Initiate an immediate peer-to-peer audio call between me James Wilson and Alice Johnson to review the latest project updates. Create a new channel named 'Project Updates' in the TechCorp Solutions Team so both of us can share notes and continue our discussion there.

verifiers.name: check Audio call start between james and alice
check new channel named 'Project Updates' created in the TechCorp
